languages.text: {n}Полковник Батошски издает тихий утробный рык, привлекая ваше внимание.{/n} "Когда вы вернетесь, мы сразимся. Таков закон нашего полка. Иного не дано".
{n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник Батошски издает тихий утробный рык, привлекая ваше внимание.{/n} "Когда вы вернетесь, мы сразимся. Таков закон нашего полка. Иного не дано".

traits.locale_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."
{n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."

"You will remain in camp, Captain-Quartermaster. We have already lost enough people trying to finish off the Drover, we won't risk losing more. Sooner or later, when the pollination season ends, it will disappear again. All we have to do is last until then. As we always have."
{n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."
{n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."
{n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."

languages.text: 「あなたはキャンプに留まります。大尉。ドルーバーを倒そうとして、すでに十分な人数を失いました。さらに多くの人を失うリスクは取れません。いつかは、花粉の季節が終わると、ドルーバーは消えていきます。私たちには、その日まで耐えるだけです。いつも通りです」
languages.original_text: "You will remain in camp, Captain-Quartermaster. We have already lost enough people trying to finish off the Drover, we won't risk losing more. Sooner or later, when the pollination season ends, it will disappear again. All we have to do is last until then. As we always have."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたはキャンプに留まります。大尉。ドルーバーを倒そうとして、すでに十分な人数を失いました。さらに多くの人を失うリスクは取れません。いつかは、花粉の季節が終わると、ドルーバーは消えていきます。私たちには、その日まで耐えるだけです。いつも通りです。」

languages.text: {n}Colonel Batoshski stößt ein kehliges Knurren aus, um deine Aufmerksamkeit zu gewinnen.{/n} "Wenn Ihr zurückkehrt, kämpfen wir. Das ist das Gesetz unseres Regiments. Einen anderen Weg gibt es nicht."
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."

traits.locale_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski stößt ein kehliges Knurren aus, um deine Aufmerksamkeit zu gewinnen.{/n} "Wenn Ihr zurückkehrt, kämpfen wir. Das ist das Gesetz unseres Regiments. Einen anderen Weg gibt es nicht."

languages.text: {n}Le colonel Batoshski pousse un grognement sourd et guttural pour attirer votre attention.{/n} « À votre retour, nous combattrons. Telle est la loi de notre régiment. Et ici, on ne transige pas avec la loi. »
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel Batoshski pousse un grognement sourd et guttural pour attirer votre attention.{/n} « À votre retour, nous combattrons. Telle est la loi de notre régiment. Et ici, on ne transige pas avec la loi. »

languages.text: {n}El coronel Batoshski suelta un gruñido grave y gutural para llamar tu atención.{/n} «Cuando vuelva, lucharemos. Es la ley del regimiento. No hay alternativa».
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel Batoshski suelta un gruñido grave y gutural para llamar tu atención.{/n} «Cuando vuelva, lucharemos. Es la ley del regimiento. No hay alternativa».

languages.text: {n}Albay Batoshski, dikkatini çekmek için boğuk, gırtlaktan gelen bir hırlama çıkarıyor.{/n} "Döndüğünüzde dövüşeceğiz. Alayımızın kanunu budur. Başka bir yolu yok."
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay Batoshski, dikkatini çekmek için boğuk, gırtlaktan gelen bir hırlama çıkarıyor.{/n} "Döndüğünüzde dövüşeceğiz. Alayımızın kanunu budur. Başka bir yolu yok."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基上校发出一声粗粝的喉音低吼，以吸引你的注意。{/n}“等您回来，我们打一场。这是军团的规矩，没有别的办法。”
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."
